falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes above 5,600 on any day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A new all-time high would invalidate the 'bottom_2024_aug' pattern match, as that pattern resolved with lower lows and consolidation; breaking to new highs indicates the structural bottom thesis was wrong and this was a bear market rally continuation, not a bottom formation

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes below 12.00 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained complacency at pre-correction levels would falsify the bottoming narrative, as the referenced August 2024 bottom featured VIX spikes above 20 and elevated volatility for weeks; rapid vol compression indicates no capitulation occurred and the 'HOLD' signal was premature

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.80% and credit spreads (HY-IG) tighten below 350bps simultaneously
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This combination of flight-to-safety in rates with risk-on in credit directly contradicts the bottom_2024_aug analog, which featured rates rising on growth fears and credit spreads blowing out past 450bps; it would signal a 'soft landing' resolution rather than the hard-landing bottom pattern currently matched

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
